instruction: Describe the potential impact of the vulnerability on affected systems.
input: Possible denial of service due to out of memory while processing RRC and NAS OTA message in Snapdragon Auto, Snapdragon Industrial IOT, Snapdragon Mobile
output: The impact of this vulnerability could lead to system unavailability or crashes, as the out-of-memory condition prevents proper processing of critical OTA messages, resulting in a Denial of Service (DoS) scenario.
